Insufficient annular ring width can lead to breakout, tangency, intermittent connections, and even complete circuit failure. This article explains annular ring fundamentals, sizing calculations, IPC requirements, design guidelin...

sections.heading: What Is an Annular Ring in PCB Design?
sections.text: In PCB design, the annular ring may seem like a small feature, but it directly affects electrical reliability, solder joint strength, and manufacturing yield. Insufficient annular ring width can lead to breakout, tangency, intermittent connections, and even complete circuit failure. This article explains annular ring fundamentals, sizing calculations, IPC requirements, design guidelines, and common failure modes to help engineers improve PCB reliability and manufacturability. Designing annular rings is not simply a matter of following a formula. Hole registration tolerance, layer-to-layer alignment, fabrication capability, and PCB reliability requirements must all be considered during the d...
